narrative:
Jackson Twp & Broughton (precinct in Paulding County) has 668 registered voters, with 47.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 42.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 31.7 percentage points.
